title: rubus helgae
intro: Rubus helgae, also known as the Arctic raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family native to the Arctic tundra. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Rubus helgae include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidants that may help to protect against certain diseases. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
